---
title: "Running"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: false
---

## Gone Running

```{=html}
<a href="https://www.strava.com/athletes/53854051" target="_blank"
   style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; background-color:#FC4C02;
          color:white; padding:12px 24px; border-radius:25px; text-decoration:none;
          font-weight:bold; font-size:16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(252,76,2,0.4);
          transition: transform 0.2s;">
  🏃 View My Strava Profile
</a>
```

### Oakland Half x Under Armour Elite Team

```{=html}
<blockquote class="instagram-media"
  data-instgrm-permalink="https://www.instagram.com/p/DWO0y71kTFG/"
  data-instgrm-version="14"
  style="width:100%; max-width:540px;">
</blockquote>
<script async src="//www.instagram.com/embed.js"></script>
```

### GU: Pace the Rainbow

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex; justify-content:center;">
  <iframe
    width="315"
    height="560"
    src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/vY5WS2eHcCo"
    title="Running YouTube Short"
    frameborder="0"
    allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
    allowfullscreen>
  </iframe>
</div>
```
